structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors
Erosion and Sediment Control Law for Localities Not Administering a Virginia Erosion and Stormwater Management Program

text.section: A final decision by a county, city, or town, when serving as a VESCP authority under this article, shall be subject to judicial review, provided that an appeal is filed within 30 days from the date of any written decision adversely affecting the rights, duties, or privileges of the person engaging in or proposing to engage in land-disturbing activities.
Final decisions of the Board shall be subject to judicial review in accordance with the provisions of the Administrative Process Act (§ 2.2-4000 et seq.).
